verses.text: Paisan Pawi leh Silngo Sawhloh Anlum Pawi a tun' ma ni nih ni-in siampi liante leh Thukham hilh siate in Jesuh simmatin a thahtheihna ding uh lampi a zong uh hi
Ahi zongin, “Mihonpite hong buai khading ahih manin hih pawi hun sungin hih kei ni,” a ci uh hi.

Bethany khua-ah, miphak ahi ngei Simon' inn-ah Jesuh in an a nek laitakin, numei khat in a manpha mahmah nard paknamtui citak suangngo thawl dimin a om khat hong tawi a, a suangngo thawl sukhamin Jesuh' lu tungah a paknamtui a sungsuk hi
Tua lai-a om mi pawlkhat a heh suak a, “Bang hangin hih paknamtui mawk beisak ahi hiam
Kizuak leh ngun peek za thum val kikhawng ding a, a sum mizawngte tungah kipia thei ding hi,” ci-in nakpi takin tua numei a mawhsak uh hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in, “Bangmah cihse kei un! Bang hangin nawngkaisak na hi uh hiam? Amah pen a kilawm a hoihin kei tungah hong gamta hi
Mizawngte ahih leh note tawh omkhawm tawntung ding a, na huhnop hun peuhpeuhun na huh thei ding uh hi. Ahi zongin kei pen note tawh kong omkhawm tawntung kei ding hi
Amah in ka luang a kivuina dingin paknamtui a hong ma nuhkhol hi a, a hihtheih zahzah ciang a hih khinta ahi hi
Hih thu limtakin phawk un! Lungdamna thu a kihilhna leitung mun khempeuhah hihnu' thu kiphawkin kei tungah hong sepnate kigengen ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua laitakin sawmlenihte sungpan Iskariot' tapa Judas in amaute tungah Jesuh a piaktheihna dingin siampi liante kiangah a va pai hi
Siampi liante in a thu a zak uh ciangin lungdam mahmah uh a, sum tawh kong guai ding uh hi, ci-in thu a ciam uh hi. Tua ahih manin Judas in Jesuh a lehhek theihna ding a hunhoih a zong hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh in A Nungzuite tawh Paisan Pawi An Ne

verses.text: Paisan Pawi an dingin tuuno a kigawh ni, Silngo Sawhloh Anlum Pawi ni masa ni-in a nungzuite in Jesuh kiangah, “Koi lai-ah pai-in Paisan Pawi an ding hong bawlsak ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite nih sawlin amaute kiangah, “Jerusalem khuasungah va pai le uh cin, tuibeel a pua mi khat na mu ding uh hi. Amah zui un la
ama tumna innteekpa kiangah, ‘Siapa in hih bangin ci hi: Ka nungzuite tawh Paisan Pawi an ka nekna ding uh zintun'na ding inndei koilai ahi hiam, ci hi,’ va ci un
Amah in a baihsa-in a na kikoihsa inndei tungnung a zai khat hong lak ding hi. Tua lai-ah na bawl un,” a ci hi
Nungzuite gel zong khuasungah va pai uh a, Jesuh' gen bangin a va mu uh hi. Tua lai-ah Paisan Pawi an ding a bawl uh hi
A nitak ciangin a nungzui sawmlenihte tawh tua munah Jesuh a om hi
An a nek laitakun Jesuh in, “Tu laitakin kei tawh an a nekhawm mi khat in kei hong lehhek ding hi,” a ci hi
A nungzuite in lamdangsa uh a, a banbanin, “Kei nong cihna hi kei buangin teh,” a ci ciat uh hi
Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “No sawmlenihte sung, kei tawh an kuang a sawkkhawmte mah sungpan ahi hi
A kigelhsa mah bangin Mihing Tapa ahih leh si ding a, ahi zongin a lehhekpa' thuakna nasia mahmah ding hi. Tua mipa a piang ngei hetlo hi leh ama-a' dingin hoihzaw tham ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua bangin an a nek laitakun Jesuh in anlum la-in lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin balnenin a nungzuite tungah pia a, “Ne un; hih pen keima pumpi ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin hai la a, lungdamna a kohkhit ciangin a nungzuite tungah pia a, tua hai panin a dawnkim uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “Hih pen mi tampite-a' dingin a luang, thuciamna thak a kipsak keima sisan ahi hi
Pasian' Ukna sungah leenggahzu thak ka dawnkik ni matengin leenggahzu a dawn nawnlo ding ka hihna thu limtakin thei un,” a ci hi
Amaute in la khat a sakkhit uh ciangin Oliv Mual-ah a pai uh hi.
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “‘Tuucingpa ka satlum ding a, tuute a kithehthang ding hi,’ ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh mah bangin note in kei nong taisan ding uh hi
Ahi zongin hong kithawh kiksak khit ciangin Galilee gam note mai-ah ka pai ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Peter in, “Adang khempeuh in nang hong taisan ahi zongin ke'n kong nusia ngei kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Jesuh in, “Tuzan mahmahin ak nihvei a khuan' ma-in thumvei tak kei na hong nial ding lamtak phawk in,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Peter in, “Nang tawh sihkhawmna ding ciangdong ahi zongin kong nial ngei het kei ding hi,” ci-in khauhtakin a gen hi. Tua mah bangin a vekpi-un a ci kim uh hi.
Tua lai panin Gethsemane a kici munah pai-in a tun' uh ciangin Jesuh in a nungzuite kiangah, “Thu ka va nget hun sungteng hih lai-ah na om un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Peter, James, leh Johan-te paipih lai a, nakpi takin lungkhamin a dahna hong kipan hi
Amah in, “Ka lungsim dahna lianlua mahmah ahih manin ka si dektak hi. Hih lai-ah om un la na ngak un,” a ci hi
Amah tawmkhat pailai-in leilakah boksuk a, ahi thei ding ahih leh hih thuakna hun tawh a kipelhna dingin thu a ngen hi
“Pa aw, na khempeuh na hihthei hi. Hih ka thuak ding gimna tawh hong kipelhsak in. Ahi zongin kei' deihna bang hiloin nangma deihna bang hizaw hen,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin hong pai a, a nungzui thumte ihmu-in om a muh ciangin Peter kiangah, “Simon aw, ihmu na hi uh hiam? Nai khat sung nangawn hong ngak zolo liang na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute kiangah, “Ze-etna-ah na pukkhak lohna dingun pilvangin thu ngen un. Lungsim in ze-etna nangnuam napi, pumpi in nang zolo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin paikhia leuleu-in thu a nget ngeiteng mah va ngen leuleu hi
Hong paikik ciangin a nungzuite na ihmu leuleu uh hi. A ihmut uh suak mahmah hi. Jesuh kiangah a gen ding uh bangmah theilo uh hi
A thumveina a hong ciahkik ciangin amaute kiangah, “Ihmu-in na tawlnga hithiat lailai na hi uh hiam? Phazo hi. A hun hong tungta hi. Mihing Tapa mawhnei mite' khutsungah hong kipia khinta hi
Tho un; pai ta ni. Kei hong lehhekpa hih lai-ah hong tungta hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh a Kilehhekna leh a Kimatna

verses.text: Tua bangin Jesuh in thu a gen laitakin sawmlenihte sung panin Judas hong tung a, siampi liante, Thukham hilh siate, leh upate in a sawl mihonte in namsau leh molhtum tawi-in hong zui uh hi
A lehhekpa in mihonte tungah, “Ka nappa pen Jesuh hi ding hi. Tuapa man un la limtakin cingin paikhiatpih un,” ci-in a genkhol hi
Tua ahih manin hong tun' phetin Jesuh kiangah paipah a, “Sia aw,” ci-in limnap mahmah hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Jesuh manin limtakin a lencip uh hi
Tua laitakin a gei-a dingte khat in a namsau dokin siampi lianpenpa' nasempa a sat leh a bil a satkhiatsak hi
Tua ciangin Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Guta buluhte a man ding bang keekin, kei a man dingin namsau leh molhtum tawh hong kuan na hi uh hiam
Nisim nisimin biakinn sungah thuhilhin note tawh ka omkhawm a, ahi zongin nong man kei uh hi. Ahi zongin hih thu pen Lai Siangtho sunga a kigelh thu a tun'na ding ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a nungzuite khempeuh in Jesuh a taisan uh hi.
Puanza kang khat bek a silh tangval khat in zong Jesuh a zui hi. Amaute pawlkhat in amah a mat ciangin
a puanza kang nusia-in a guaktangin a tai hi.
Mihonte in siampi lianpenpa' inn-ah Jesuh paipih uh a, siampi liante, upate, leh Thukham hilh siate hong kikhawm uh hi
Peter in zong Jesuh' nung galzuih a, siampi lianpenpa' inntual ciangah a om hi. Tua lai-ah palikte tawh mei awi-in a tukhawm hi
Siampi liante-a kipan uliante khempeuh in Jesuh a thahtheihna dingin thu zong uh a, ahi zongin bangmah mulo uh hi
Mi tampi in amah a mawhsakna dingun zuauthu gen uh a, ahi zongin a genna uh khatlekhat kituaklo hi
Tua ciangin mi pawlkhat hong dingin amah a mawhsakna dingun zuauthu hong gen uh a
“Mihingte' lam hih biakinn ka susia ding a, ni thum khit ciangin mihingte' lam a hilo adang khat ka lam ding hi,” a cihna ka za uh hi, ci-in hong gen uh hi
Amaute nangawn zong a thugenzia uh kituaklo hi
Tua ciangin amaute khempeuh mai-ah siampi lianpenpa hong dingin Jesuh thu dong a, “Nangmah mawhsakna-in a gen uh thute na dawn'na ding omlo ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh pauloin a omcip hi. Tua ciangin siampi lianpenpa in, “Phatna a ngah Pasian' Tapa, Khrih na hi hiam?” ci-in a dongkik leuleu hi
Jesuh in, “Ka hi hi; Vanglian Pasian' taklamah Mihing Tapa omin meii lakah a hong pai na mu ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin siampi lianpenpa in a puan balkek a, “Thudang kisam nawnlo hi
Pasian' tungah a paukhialhna na zazo uh hi. Bangci ngaihsut na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi. Hih mipa thah dingin kilawm hi, ci-in amaute khempeuh in thu a khen uh hi
Tua ciangin mi pawlkhat in cilphih uh a, a mai tunsakin beng uh a, “Kua in hong beng ahi hiam, gen in,” a ci uh hi. Palikte in zong amah paipihin a beng uh hi.
A nuai-a inntualah Peter a om laitakin siampi lianpenpa' nasem numeite khat hong pai a
Peter mei awi-in om a muh ciangin limtakin en a, “Nang zong, Nazareth khuami Jesuh tawh na kikhawl ngei hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Peter in nial a, “Ka thei kei hi; bang na cihna ahi hiam, cih zong ka tel kei hi,” ci-in dawngin tual pualam paina lampi lamah a pai hi. Tua laitakin ak a khuang hi
Tua numei mah in a omna-ah Peter mu a, a gei-a omte kiangah, “Hihpa, hua mite khat hi takpi hi,” a cikik leuleu hi
Ahi zongin Peter in nial leuleu hi. Tawlkhat khit ciangin a gei-a omte in Peter kiangah, “Nang zong Galilee gammi na hih manin huate khat na hi takpi hi,” a ci leuleu uh hi
Tua ciangin Peter in, “Na gen mipa uh ka theih taak leh Pasian in kei hong dawm kei ta hen,” ci-in a kiciam hi
Tua khit phetin ak nihveina a khuang hi. Tua ciangin, “Ak nihvei a khuan' ma-in kei thumvei na hong nial ding hi,” ci-in Jesuh in ama tungah a gensa thu Peter in phawkkik a, dahlua-in a kap hi.
